source_rationale: PRG4 (proteoglycan 4/lubricin) is a marker of mesenchymal progenitor cells in adipose tissue
PI16 is a well-established marker of universal fibroblast/adipocyte progenitor cells in human adipose tissue
FBN1 (fibrillin-1) marks interstitial progenitor cells in adipose tissue stroma
MFAP5 (microfibril-associated protein 5) is expressed in adipose-derived stromal/progenitor cells
CD248 (endosialin) is a surface marker of mesenchymal stromal/adipocyte precursor cells
IGFBP5 is involved in IGF signaling critical for adipogenesis and marks adipocyte progenitors
COL1A1 is a major extracellular matrix gene highly expressed in fibroblastic adipocyte precursors
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in committed preadipocytes
Decorin is a proteoglycan characteristic of mesenchymal/fibroblastic adipose progenitor cells
PROCR (CD201) marks multipotent adipose progenitor cells with high adipogenic potential
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor complex and a canonical B cell lineage marker
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell surface marker used clinically for B cell identification
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor essential for B cell maturation
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in B cells for MHC class II antigen presentation
IGKC (immunoglobulin kappa constant) reflects immunoglobulin production by B cells and plasma cells
JCHAIN is essential for polymeric immunoglobulin assembly in antibody-secreting B cells
CD37 is a tetraspanin predominantly expressed on B cells, involved in B cell signaling
BCL11A is a transcription factor critical for B cell development and differentiation
TRGC2 (T cell receptor gamma constant 2) is a defining marker of gamma delta T cells
CD7 is a T/NK cell marker highly expressed on gamma delta T cells
KLRC2 (NKG2C) is an activating NK receptor expressed on gamma delta T cell subsets
LEF1 is a Wnt pathway transcription factor marking less differentiated T cell states
TCF7 is a key transcription factor for T cell development, enriched in gamma delta T cells
ZNF683 (Hobit) is a transcription factor associated with tissue-resident lymphocyte identity
XCL1 (lymphotactin) is a chemokine characteristically produced by gamma delta T cells and NK cells
IL7R marks gamma delta T cell subsets and is important for their homeostasis
Granulysin is a cytolytic effector molecule characteristic of cytotoxic T lymphocytes
Granzyme B is a key cytotoxic effector protease in CD8+ cytotoxic T cells
Granzyme H is a serine protease enriched in terminally differentiated cytotoxic T cells
CD8A is the canonical surface marker defining CD8+ T cells
Perforin is essential for cytotoxic granule-mediated killing by CD8+ T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule membrane protein highly expressed in effector CD8+ T cells
FGFBP2 is a marker of terminally differentiated cytotoxic effector lymphocytes
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine constitutively expressed by effector CD8+ T cells
CD8B pairs with CD8A to form the CD8 co-receptor on conventional cytotoxic T cells
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein and canonical endothelial cell marker
PECAM1 (CD31) is a definitive endothelial cell surface marker used for vascular identification
Von Willebrand factor is a glycoprotein produced by endothelial cells, a classic endothelial marker
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial-specific adherens junction protein
ESAM is an endothelial cell-selective adhesion molecule at tight junctions
FLT1 (VEGFR1) is a VEGF receptor specifically expressed on endothelial cells
Endomucin is a sialomucin expressed on the luminal surface of endothelial cells
FABP4 is highly expressed in capillary endothelial cells for fatty acid transport
ICAM2 is constitutively expressed on endothelial cells and used as an endothelial marker
SOX17 is a transcription factor essential for arterial endothelial cell identity
GZMK marks immature/less differentiated NK cells compared to GZMB-high mature NK cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory receptor enriched on immature NK cells
NCAM1 (CD56) is the canonical NK cell marker, with bright expression on immature NK cells
SELL (CD62L) is expressed on immature/CD56bright NK cells but lost upon maturation
CMC1 is a cytotoxic granule-associated gene expressed in NK cell lineage
XCL2 is a chemokine produced by NK cells, particularly CD56bright immature NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor expressed throughout NK cell development
TCF7 expression marks immature/less differentiated NK cells
IL7R is expressed on immature CD56bright NK cells and supports their development
IL1B is a hallmark pro-inflammatory cytokine of classically activated inflammatory macrophages
CXCL8 (IL-8) is a key chemokine produced by inflammatory macrophages for neutrophil recruitment
CXCL2 is an inflammatory chemokine characteristic of activated macrophages
CD163 is a scavenger receptor and macrophage lineage marker
TNF is a master pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by inflammatory macrophages
NLRP3 inflammasome is a hallmark of inflammatory macrophage activation
PTGS2 (COX-2) is an inducible enzyme in inflammatory macrophages producing prostaglandins
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is an inflammatory chemokine produced by activated macrophages
SOD2 is upregulated in inflammatory macrophages as part of the oxidative stress response
FCN1 (ficolin-1) is a pattern recognition molecule marking monocyte-derived inflammatory macrophages
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker of innate lymphoid cells across all ILC subsets
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for ILC2 and is expressed across ILC populations
IL7R (CD127) is a canonical surface marker of innate lymphoid cells
KIT (CD117) is expressed on ILC progenitors and ILC3 subsets
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is highly expressed on ILCs, particularly ILC2s
IL1RL1 (ST2/IL-33R) is a key receptor on ILC2s for alarmin-mediated activation
TNFRSF4 (OX40) is expressed on activated ILCs
ID2 is a transcription factor essential for ILC lineage commitment
Amphiregulin is a tissue-repair effector molecule produced by ILC2s
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine highly expressed in ILC1s
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILC1s and NK-like cells
IL7R (CD127) distinguishes ILC1s from NK cells among group 1 ILCs
ETS1 is a transcription factor important for ILC1 development and function
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical ILC marker expressed on ILC1s
GATA3 is expressed at intermediate levels in ILC1s, distinguishing them from ILC2s
SPOCK2 is enriched in ILC1 populations in human tissues
IL1RL1 (ST2) is the IL-33 receptor and a defining marker of ILC2s
GATA3 is the master transcription factor defining ILC2 identity
HPGD (prostaglandin dehydrogenase) is a characteristic marker of ILC2s
RORA is a transcription factor required for ILC2 development
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical surface marker of ILC2s
IL7R (CD127) is a key surface marker for identifying ILC2s
IL2RA (CD25) is expressed on activated ILC2s
SLAMF1 is a surface receptor enriched on ILC2s in human tissues
PTGS2 (COX-2) is involved in prostaglandin synthesis in activated ILC2s
KIT (CD117) is a canonical surface marker of ILC3s
CCR6 marks the LTi-like ILC3 subset and is a key ILC3 identifier
IL7R (CD127) is a canonical ILC3 surface marker
LTB (lymphotoxin beta) is produced by ILC3s, especially LTi-like cells
IL1R1 is expressed on ILC3s and mediates IL-1-driven activation
TNFSF11 (RANKL) is expressed by ILC3s, particularly LTi-like cells
DLL1 (Delta-like 1) is associated with ILC3 differentiation via Notch signaling
RUNX2 is a transcription factor involved in ILC3 development
KLRB1 (CD161) is expressed on ILC3s as a pan-ILC marker
IL7R is essential for ILC precursor survival and development
KIT (CD117) marks ILC precursors with multilineage potential
SPINK2 is a marker of hematopoietic progenitor and ILC precursor cells
SELL (CD62L) is expressed on circulating ILC precursors
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is expressed on ILC precursors
GATA3 is expressed at early stages in ILC precursors committing to the ILC lineage
TCF7 is a transcription factor marking early lymphoid/ILC precursors
TNFRSF4 (OX40) is expressed on ILC precursors
INPP4B is enriched in ILC precursors and involved in PI3K signaling regulation
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein highly expressed in lipid-laden macrophages
FABP5 is a lipid chaperone enriched in lipid-associated macrophages
APOE is a hallmark gene of lipid-associated macrophages involved in lipid metabolism
TREM2 is a defining marker of lipid-associated macrophages across tissues
SPP1 (osteopontin) is highly expressed in lipid-associated macrophages
LIPA (lysosomal acid lipase) is essential for lipid processing in lipid-associated macrophages
CD68 is a lysosomal glycoprotein and canonical macrophage marker
GPNMB is a glycoprotein enriched in lipid-associated macrophages
CD9 is a tetraspanin marking lipid-associated macrophages in adipose tissue
LPL (lipoprotein lipase) is involved in lipid uptake by lipid-associated macrophages
Granulysin is a cytotoxic effector molecule highly expressed in mature NK cells
Granzyme B is a key cytotoxic protease in mature effector NK cells
FCGR3A (CD16) is the canonical marker of mature CD56dim NK cells mediating ADCC
KLRF1 (NKp80) is an activating receptor specific to NK cells

Perforin is essential for NK cell cytotoxicity and marks mature NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor broadly expressed on mature NK cells
FGFBP2 is a marker of terminally differentiated mature NK cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein highly expressed in mature NK cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta chain) is part of the NK cell activating receptor complex
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical surface marker of MAIT cells
RORA is a transcription factor characteristic of MAIT cells
SLC4A10 is a highly specific marker of MAIT cells in human blood and tissues
NCR3 (NKp30) is expressed on MAIT cells and involved in their innate-like function
CCR6 is a chemokine receptor expressed on MAIT cells for mucosal homing
IL7R is expressed on MAIT cells and supports their homeostasis
GZMK is a granzyme enriched in MAIT cells reflecting their cytotoxic potential
TRGC2 expression reflects the innate-like TCR usage in MAIT cells
Most MAIT cells are CD8+ and CD8A marks this predominant subset
S100A9 is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in myeloid cells, especially monocytes/neutrophils
S100A8 forms a heterodimer with S100A9 (calprotectin) and is a myeloid cell marker
Lysozyme is a canonical myeloid lineage marker expressed in monocytes and macrophages
AIF1 (IBA1) is a myeloid cell marker involved in inflammatory responses
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein essential for myeloid cell signaling
FCER1G is an Fc receptor signaling subunit broadly expressed in myeloid cells
FCN1 is a pattern recognition molecule marking monocyte-lineage myeloid cells
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in antigen-presenting myeloid cells
Cathepsin S is a protease involved in MHC class II processing in myeloid cells
IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine characteristic of activated myeloid cells
IL7R (CD127) is highly expressed on naive CD4+ T cells for homeostatic survival
CD40LG (CD154) is a CD4+ T cell-specific costimulatory molecule
MAF is a transcription factor involved in CD4+ T cell differentiation
CD2 is a T cell surface marker expressed on naive T cells
CXCR4 is a chemokine receptor expressed on naive T cells for lymph node homing
LTB (lymphotoxin beta) is expressed by naive CD4+ T cells
ITK is a tyrosine kinase important for TCR signaling in CD4+ T cells
CD3E is a component of the TCR complex marking T cells
CD8A is the canonical marker of CD8+ T cells
CD8B pairs with CD8A and marks conventional CD8+ T cells
GZMK marks early-activated/naive CD8+ T cells before full cytotoxic differentiation
CCL5 is expressed by CD8+ T cells and increases with activation
CRTAM is expressed on recently activated naive CD8+ T cells
RUNX3 is a transcription factor essential for CD8+ T cell lineage commitment
SH2D1A (SAP) is involved in T cell signaling and expressed in CD8+ T cells

XCL1 is a chemokine highly produced by NK-like cells
XCL2 is a chemokine characteristic of NK-like lymphocytes
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor marking NK-like cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor for NK cell activating receptors
FCER1G is a signaling adaptor for NK cell receptors
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor expressed on NK-like cells

S100A9 is a major neutrophil protein forming calprotectin, a canonical neutrophil marker

S100A12 (calgranulin C) is a neutrophil-specific alarmin

LST1 is highly expressed in nonclassical monocytes

TNFRSF18 (GITR) is constitutively expressed on Tregs

MYL9 (myosin light chain 9) is a contractile protein specific to smooth muscle cells
RGS5 is a regulator of G-protein signaling marking pericytes and smooth muscle cells
NOTCH3 is a receptor essential for smooth muscle cell/pericyte identity
PDGFRB is a receptor tyrosine kinase marking pericytes and smooth muscle cells
TPM2 (tropomyosin 2) is a contractile protein enriched in smooth muscle cells
MCAM (CD146) is a surface marker of pericytes and smooth muscle cells
PLN (phospholamban) regulates calcium handling in smooth muscle cells
GJA4 (connexin 37) is a gap junction protein expressed in vascular smooth muscle
GZMK is enriched in tissue-resident NK cells compared to circulating mature NK cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory receptor expressed on tissue-resident NK cells

IL2RB (CD122) is expressed on NK cells for IL-15 signaling essential for tissue residency
ALOX5AP is involved in leukotriene synthesis in tissue-resident NK cells

FCN1 marks classical monocytes
